testcase.name: test_analytics_endpoint_still_works
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gdpr_sprint4.py:64: in test_analytics_endpoint_still_works assert r.status_code in (200, 403, 404), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 in (200, 403, 404) E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_superadmin_upload_lands_in_platform

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected platform/ prefix, got: assert False + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfcf6e3f10be8>('platform/') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfcf6e3f10be8> = ''.startswith

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gdpr_sprint4.py:135: in test_superadmin_upload_lands_in_platform assert folder.startswith('platform/'), f'Expected platform/ prefix, got: {folder}' E AssertionError: Expected platform/ prefix, got: E assert False E + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfcf6e3f10be8>('platform/') E + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfcf6e3f10be8> = ''.startswith
